metadata.description: Add scoped running-time observability and terminal result queries for detached bash and detached delegate actor tasks.

repair.description: Align observability query wire entries and default retention values discovered during fresh gap-loop review.

items.item: DetachedActorLogs and DetachedActorResult log tails return snake_case wire fields consistently with message tails.
Default log and message retention matches documented implementation notes: 512 entries and 256 KiB per buffer.

repair.description: Ensure terminal bash result queries include bounded stdout/stderr tail data by default.

items.item: DetachedActorResult includes recent log tails for completed bash tasks unless callers explicitly disable logs.
Regression coverage asserts stdout/stderr tail data is present in completed bash results without include_logs.

repair.description: Capture detached delegate terminal status events in the message observability stream.

items.item: Completed, failed, and cancelled detached delegate actors append system_event status entries before terminal result publication.
Regression coverage asserts completed delegate results expose a completion status entry in the optional message tail.

repair.description: Report query-level truncation when retained log or message entries are omitted by caller limits.

items.item: Detached observability queries set truncated=true when limit_entries or limit_bytes omits retained entries.
Regression coverage asserts query-level truncation metadata without retention rollover.

repair.description: Preserve RunDetachedBash background-settled compatibility while keeping direct streaming log observability.

items.item: RunDetachedBash direct streaming tasks register with the active orchestrator for background-settled waits.
Bound detached fibers can stream stdout and stderr from the bash tool into detached observability logs.
Detached bash terminal result output derives from the final tool result instead of an empty assistant tool-call message.

repair.description: Expose detached task creation and observability tools in the default agent toolset.

items.item: RunDetachedBash, DetachedActorList, DetachedActorStatus, DetachedActorLogs, DetachedActorMessages, and DetachedActorResult are no longer filtered as internal-only builtins.
Registry and agent tool schema tests assert detached observability tools are visible by default.

repair.description: Rename the public detached bash tool to RunDetachedBash.

items.item: The public builtin schema registers RunDetachedBash and no longer registers DetachedBash.
Tool prompt metadata, implementation directory, tests, and track documents use RunDetachedBash for the public tool name.

phase.name: Observability Model And Query Contracts
phase.goal: Define bounded detached log/message/result data model and query tool contracts.

task.name: Add observability model tests
task.description: Write failing tests for per-task ring buffer sequencing, source filtering, byte/entry limits, and dropped metadata.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Tests cover stdout/stderr filtering and monotonic sequence cursors.
Tests cover rolling discard metadata when retention limits are exceeded.

task.name: Implement detached observability store
task.description: Add in-runtime structures and helpers for detached log chunks, message entries, result snapshots, and bounded retention.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Detached observability helpers append and query by task id.
Overflow behavior preserves newest entries and reports dropped metadata.

task.name: Add query tool contract tests
task.description: Write failing tests for DetachedActorLogs, DetachedActorMessages, and DetachedActorResult tool schemas and empty/not-found behavior.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Query tools validate missing and unknown task ids.
Query tools support source, role, kind, range, and limit parameters.

task.name: Implement query tools
task.description: Add tools for detached logs, detached messages, and detached terminal results while preserving DetachedActorStatus compatibility.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: DetachedActorLogs returns scoped log chunks and cursor metadata.
DetachedActorMessages returns scoped message entries and cursor metadata.
DetachedActorResult returns terminal state and not-terminal responses.

phase.name: Streaming Detached Bash
phase.goal: Make RunDetachedBash observable while running through streaming stdout/stderr capture.

task.name: Add streaming bash tests
task.description: Write failing tests showing RunDetachedBash stdout/stderr can be queried while the command is still running and after it exits.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Running RunDetachedBash exposes stdout tail before completion.
Running RunDetachedBash exposes stderr tail separately before completion.
Completed RunDetachedBash result includes terminal status and bounded stdout/stderr tail.

task.name: Implement streaming sandboxed bash backend
task.description: Add a streaming process backend that shares permission and sandbox selection semantics with existing bash execution.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Streaming backend appends stdout and stderr chunks with source metadata.
Timeout, process error, exit code, and signal are reflected in task result.

task.name: Wire RunDetachedBash to streaming execution
task.description: Route RunDetachedBash through the streaming backend while keeping task id creation and background scheduling behavior stable.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: RunDetachedBash still returns a parseable task id immediately.
RunDetachedBash logs are queryable by source while running.
Existing detached bash tests continue to pass or are updated to the new observability contract.

phase.name: Detached Delegate Messages And Results
phase.goal: Expose recent messages and terminal results for RunDelegateActor detached tasks.

task.name: Add delegate message observability tests
task.description: Write failing tests for querying assistant messages, tool call starts, tool results, errors, range cursors, and retention metadata from detached delegate actors.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Tests cover role-filtered assistant message queries.
Tests cover kind-filtered tool event queries.
Tests verify system prompts and hidden reasoning are not exposed.

task.name: Capture delegate actor entries
task.description: Add executor/orchestrator taps that append message and tool event entries to the detached observability store for child fibers.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Assistant output, tool call start, tool result, failure, cancellation, and completion entries are captured.
Entries are associated with the correct task id and child actor/fiber identifiers.

task.name: Implement delegate result queries
task.description: Return terminal status, final assistant result, and optional bounded message tail for completed detached delegate actors.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Completed delegate result includes final assistant text.
Non-terminal delegate result reports current status unless partial results are requested.

phase.name: Compatibility And Verification
phase.goal: Preserve existing detached status, background result events, and recovery semantics while validating the new observability path.

task.name: Add compatibility regression tests
task.description: Verify DetachedActorStatus, DetachedActorList, semantic background result events, and existing detached task completion behavior remain compatible.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Existing status/list JSON shape remains compatible.
Background result events still emit terminal results.

task.name: Run focused test suites
task.description: Run the smallest relevant Bun test targets for detached bash, detached status, orchestration, sandbox backend, and terminal projection behavior.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Focused detached actor and sandbox tests pass.
No regression is introduced in terminal background result projection tests.

task.name: Document implementation notes
task.description: Update track analysis notes with final defaults, caveats, and any deferred durability work.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Track analysis documents default retention limits and known tradeoffs.
